pr_text:
## Title: Add defensive clamping to prevent buffer overruns in OTG TARMA model

### Summary
The TARMA (Time-AutoRegressive Moving Average) traffic model in the OTG subsystem can generate extreme values that lead to buffer overruns and excessive memory allocation. When `tarmaCalculateSample()` returns very large positive or negative values, these are used directly for memory allocation and string generation, causing potential buffer overruns in downstream string operations. This fix implements mu
